## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code change that's neither feat nor fix
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore — deps, build, configs
- [ ] ci — CI/CD changes
- [ ] hotfix — emergency production fix

<!-- If any are unchecked, explain below -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `docs/`, `hotfix/`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `black --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated if architecture or conventions changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` section updated
- [ ] SESSION_LOG.md will be updated when this work is complete
